Live Captions (fixture)

Open DevTools console and run the snippet in the comments above to add caption lines dynamically so the MutationObserver fires.

Alice Nguyen Welcome everyone, let's get started with today's agenda.
Bob Martinez Thanks Alice. I'll go through the Q1 metrics first.
Carol Smith Could you share your screen so we can follow along?

Console snippet — paste into DevTools to inject a live caption:

const container = document.querySelector("[data-tid='closed-captions-renderer']");
const line = document.createElement("div");
line.setAttribute("data-tid", "closed-caption-text");
line.innerHTML = `<span class="caption-speaker">David Park</span>Great, I can see it now.`;
container.appendChild(line);
